phrases.finish: glossy plastic-and-gold premium finish, restrained not gaudy; clean pure saturated colors; smooth airbrushed gradients; one crisp specular pop per object plus a subtle top sheen band; zero noise, zero texture grain, zero photorealism
phrases.lighting: single key light from the top, strong clear highlights, gentle ambient occlusion in crevices, soft round contact shadow directly beneath the object
phrases.rendering: premium mobile casual-game asset rendering: chunky 3D-ish volumes with hand-painted baked lighting (semi-painted, not photoreal 3D), bold readable silhouette that stays legible at 64px; subject matter strictly neutral premium motifs — stars, gems, coins, medals, ribbons, laurels, sparkles — absolutely no animals, characters, mascots, brands, or licensed shapes
phrases.shape: rounded chunky silhouettes with large soft corners and slight squash; every object closed by a thin outline in a darker shade of its own fill color (never black); centered single subject with generous breathing room

sources: hand-authored gold standard 2026-07-16 (Batu-directed); design/style-guide.ingest-baseline.json holds the raw ingest output from design/refs/*.png for tool evaluation
